'''Maldra IV''' was a [[Planet/Legends|planet]] in the [[Maldra system/Legends|Maldra system]] of the [[Outer Rim Territories/Legends|Outer Rim's]] [[Shadola sector/Legends|Shadola sector]]. Not long after the [[Battle of Yavin/Legends|Battle of Yavin]], the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]] sought to [[Battle of Maldra IV|destroy]] a [[Pirate/Legends|pirate]] base on the planet, but discovered the base actually belonged to the [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebels]]. The Empire claimed it was a munitions base; the Alliance claimed it was a [[Safe world/Legends|refugee base]]. Regardless of the propaganda, Imperial forces led by the Imperial [[Star Destroyer/Legends|Star Destroyer]] [[Motivator (Imperial-class)|''Motivator'']] under the command of [[Captain/Legends|Captain]] [[Briera]] demolished the base.
